channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: Bolivia's capital under siege as protests deepen crisis for President Paz
item.description: Bolivia's President Rodrigo Paz faces a deepening crisis as widespread protests and blockades leave the political capital under siege less than six months after he took office.
item.content:encoded:
Bolivia's President Rodrigo Paz faces a deepening crisis as widespread protests and blockades leave the political capital under siege less than six months after he took office.

(Image credit: Freddy Barragan)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: WHO chief concerned over 'scale and speed' of Ebola outbreak
item.description: The World Health Organization top official has expressed concern over the rapid spread of a rare type of Ebola in Congo. Authorities have reported at least 134 suspected deaths and over 500 cases.
item.content:encoded:
The World Health Organization top official has expressed concern over the rapid spread of a rare type of Ebola in Congo. Authorities have reported at least 134 suspected deaths and over 500 cases.

(Image credit: Dirole Lotsima Dieudonne)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Xi and Putin meet to reaffirm China-Russia ties days after Trump's visit
item.description: Chinese leader Xi Jinping welcomed Russian President Vladimir Putin in Beijing on Wednesday in a meeting meant to reaffirm ties and that takes place only days after a visit by President Donald Trump.
item.content:encoded:
Chinese leader Xi Jinping welcomed Russian President Vladimir Putin in Beijing on Wednesday in a meeting meant to reaffirm ties and that takes place only days after a visit by President Donald Trump.

(Image credit: Maxim Shemetov)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: In Georgia, two GOP Trump backers vie to face former Atlanta mayor for governor
item.description: Georgia is a swing state where both Democrats and Republicans are deciding the direction their parties will take in the fall in races for the senate and the governor's mansion.
item.content:encoded:
Georgia is a swing state where both Democrats and Republicans are deciding the direction their parties will take in the fall in races for the senate and the governor's mansion.

(Image credit: Brynn Anderson)
item.dc:creator: Sarah Kallis

item.title: U.S. government to drop tax claims against Trump in broadening of IRS settlement
item.description: As part of the settlement agreement, the U.S. is "forever barred and precluded" from examining or prosecuting President Trump, his sons and the Trump organization's current tax issues, according to a document posted to the DOJ website.
item.content:encoded:
As part of the settlement agreement, the U.S. is "forever barred and precluded" from examining or prosecuting President Trump, his sons and the Trump organization's current tax issues, according to a document posted to the DOJ website.

(Image credit: Julia Demaree Nikhinson)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Endorsed by Trump, Ed Gallrein defeats Rep. Thomas Massie in GOP House primary
item.description: In a major victory for President Trump, his hand-picked challenger, Ed Gallrein, beat out U.S. House Rep. Thomas Massie in a Kentucky House GOP primary, ending Massie's reelection bid.
item.content:encoded:
In a major victory for President Trump, his hand-picked challenger, Ed Gallrein, beat out U.S. House Rep. Thomas Massie in a Kentucky House GOP primary, ending Massie's reelection bid.

(Image credit: Jon Cherry)
item.dc:creator: Sylvia Goodman

item.title: 'Taiwan Travelogue' wins the 2026 International Booker Prize
item.description: The novel is the first work translated from Mandarin Chinese to win the award, which celebrates its 10th anniversary this year.
item.content:encoded:
The novel is the first work translated from Mandarin Chinese to win the award, which celebrates its 10th anniversary this year.

(Image credit: Adrian Dennis)
item.dc:creator: Ivy Buck

item.title: In the face of devastating loss, Jesmyn Ward holds onto 'respair'
item.description: Ward learned the term "respair" — meaning the recovery of hope after despair — during the pandemic. Her new book On Witness and Respair is an essay collection on grief, motherhood and survival.
item.content:encoded:
Ward learned the term "respair" — meaning the recovery of hope after despair — during the pandemic. Her new book On Witness and Respair is an essay collection on grief, motherhood and survival.

(Image credit: Beowulf Sheehan)
item.dc:creator: Tonya Mosley

item.title: Trump endorses Ken Paxton over incumbent John Cornyn in Texas Senate primary runoff
item.description: President Trump has endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton over incumbent Sen. John Cornyn in the Texas GOP runoff for U.S. Senate, one week before voting ends in the contentious and expensive primary.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump has endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton over incumbent Sen. John Cornyn in the Texas GOP runoff for U.S. Senate, one week before voting ends in the contentious and expensive primary.

(Image credit: Greg Nash)
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler

item.title: Minnesota becomes first state to ban prediction markets
item.description: While dozens of states have taken legal action against the controversial industry, Minnesota is the first state to pass a law making it a felony for companies like Kalshi and Polymarket to operate.
item.content:encoded:
While dozens of states have taken legal action against the controversial industry, Minnesota is the first state to pass a law making it a felony for companies like Kalshi and Polymarket to operate.

(Image credit: Steve Karnowski)
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn
